# FGCZ live layout example

# FGCZ live layout example

Code

- [First](https://prolfqua.github.io/fgczquartotemplate/)
- [Second](https://prolfqua.github.io/fgczquartotemplate/)
- [Nested](https://prolfqua.github.io/fgczquartotemplate/)
- [Three-level](https://prolfqua.github.io/fgczquartotemplate/)
- [Five-level](https://prolfqua.github.io/fgczquartotemplate/)
- [Session Info](https://prolfqua.github.io/fgczquartotemplate/)

NoteAbout this section

Use a full-width callout when the note applies to *everything* in the
sub-tab rather than one figure. Swap `note` for `tip` / `warning` /
`important` to change the colour and icon; add `collapse="true"` to fold
it shut by default.

Main content of the tab then runs full-width underneath.

![](data:image/png;base64,)

Fuel economy versus weight across the mtcars dataset.

TipWhat this shows

Each point is one of the **32** cars; mean fuel economy is **20.1 mpg**,
and heavier cars are clearly less efficient. This green box is an
optional annotation beside the plot — the figure’s own caption sits
underneath as usual.

- [Table](https://prolfqua.github.io/fgczquartotemplate/)
- [Figure](https://prolfqua.github.io/fgczquartotemplate/)

![](data:image/png;base64,)

Demo figure — fuel economy by cylinder count.
